## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and technical website issues.](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance improving overall; GrowthX content metrics need investigation](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Seasonality in educational content crucial; summer focus on admin/purchasing content](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Need to address philosophical/ethical AI in education topics](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Technical issues with robots.txt and sitemap need resolution](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Overall site impressions/clicks up 25k/954 respectively](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [GrowthX blog content down, but dashboard accuracy in question](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Seasonality impacts educational content performance](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [School year cycle affects teacher-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Summer: focus on admin/purchasing content (buying season)](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [New content ideas:](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [AI ethics in education](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Administrator-focused AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
      - [Summer learning with AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

### SEO Metrics and Reporting

  - [Average position metric can be misleading; new report in development](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Clicks/impressions increasing despite position changes](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Need to account for educational seasonality in metrics](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [robots.txt file needs updating to properly handle spaces pages](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Sitemap requires cleanup to remove non-indexable pages](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [Framer limitations causing difficulties in implementing changes](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [New educator (Graham) providing valuable feedback on AI content](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Addressing hyperbolic language about AI capabilities in articles](https://fathom.video/share/n-EUByzm6NuLwg8cgz2dKeio8skzK_u6?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
